date_of_joining: December 2025 (Post examination) or January 2026 (1 st Week). Leaves will be provided for final examination

package_salary.ppo_ctc: ● Stipend during training (till receive provisional degree) : 20 K per month ● Salary after training (till receive provisional degree) : CTC 6 – 7 LPA (PF deduction)
package_salary.bond: Yes. The bond would be of 2 lacs for 2 years . In case they decide to leave the organization before this period, they are required to pay this amount in full to the employer to incur the cost of training.
